title: viola × tessinensis
intro: Viola × tessinensis, also known as the hybrid pansy or Viola x wittrockiana, is a hybrid plant species within the violet family, resulting from the cross-breeding of Viola sororia and Viola x wittrockiana. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola × tessinensis include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antiseptic agent to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Viola × tessinensis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin irritations and digestive issues.
